case_title: CESAR CHAVEZ FOUNDATION VS. ALYSSA BLUEFORD ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLUEFORD, ALYSSA ORDER SETTING HEARING FOR MAR-02-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-02-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ALYSSA BLUEFORD'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT) OF DEFENDANT ALYSSA BLUEFORD IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
